notes:
Narration reliability fix — the voice no longer cuts out, stalls, or goes silent mid-chapter. And if the offline neural voice ever can't load, narration now falls back to your device voice instead of playing nothing.

New source: Asura Scans — a big manhwa library, now in Browse alongside the others (search, covers, newest-first chapters, full reader). Switch any title to it from the detail page.

Also fixed: 'Page Not Found' when opening some MangaPill chapters.
